overall.description: A static shot of a dimly lit gothic cathedral interior from a video game, featuring stone architecture, rose windows, and robed NPCs walking through the hall. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with cool-toned lighting emanating from wall sconces and chandeliers.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral nave with seating and altar area

agents.ego_description: standing still observing the cathedral interior while robed figures move through the hall

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking slowly across the center aisle toward the altar area
robed figure standing near the left wall observing the hall

entered.detail: large circular stained glass windows with stone tracery at the far end of the cathedral
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling on the left side
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling on the right side
circular wooden table with items on top in the foreground
rows of wooden pews and benches arranged in the nave
lit chandelier hanging from the ceiling providing warm light
intricate geometric stone tile pattern covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of a vast gothic cathedral interior with soaring stone pillars and rose windows at the far end. Several robed NPCs walk slowly through the space or stand in contemplation, while warm light from chandeliers illuminates the cool stone architecture. The atmosphere is serene and atmospheric, typical of a medieval fantasy game setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a vast gothic cathedral interior that emphasizes the scale and serenity of the sacred space. It begins with a wide view of soaring stone pillars and intricate rose windows that anchor the far end of the hall. As the camera holds its position, the cool-toned stone architecture is punctuated by the warm, flickering glow of chandeliers. The scene remains still as robed NPCs drift slowly through the nave or stand in quiet contemplation, their movements adding a sense of living history to the silent environment.
